name: ripvec
description: Semantic code search + multi-language LSP. 21 grammars, 26 extensions, function-level PageRank, hybrid BM25+vector ranking. Model2Vec static encoder + TinyBERT cross-encoder reranker, CPU-only. 4.0: LSP-shaped composability — every tool returns lsp_location; every position tool accepts it. Single `search` with corpus/rerank/include_metadata flags replaces search_code/search_text. get_repo_map returns JSON with lsp_location-grounded files array. Zero-destructure tool chaining.
